sections.paragraph:
- Original: Βαράκ

- Transliteration: Barak

- Phonetic: bar-ak'

- Definition: Barak = "lightning"

1. a commander of the Israelites

- Origin: of hebrew origin H1301

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Of hebrew origin [H1301]; Barak an Israelite: - Barak.
